zh.lifeSummary: Eme Hillson於1512年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾法爾沃斯。她於大約1532年與Lord Humphrey Gorsuch在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯可特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1545年1月10日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯可特享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Eme Hillson于1512年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾法爾沃斯。她于大约1532年与Lord Humphrey Gorsuch在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯可特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1545年1月10日在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯可特享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation; the name of Cú Chulainn's beloved, a woman of many talents who was blessed with beauty, wisdom, and chastity. It was revived as a given name in the 20th century.

variants.name: Emer
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation; the name of Cú Chulainn's beloved, a woman of many talents who was blessed with beauty, wisdom, and chastity. It was revived as a given name in the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: Eme Hillson was born in 1512, in Farnworth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. She married Lord Humphrey Gorsuch about 1532, in Prescot, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died on 10 January 1545, in Prescot, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Eme Hillson est née en 1512, à Farnworth, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Lord Humphrey Gorsuch environ 1532, à Prescot, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée le 10 janvier 1545, à Prescot, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Eme Hillson wurde 1512 in Farnworth, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1532 in Prescot, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Lord Humphrey Gorsuch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb am 10. Januar 1545 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Prescot, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Eme Hillson è nata il nel 1512 nel Farnworth, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Lord Humphrey Gorsuch circa 1532, nel Prescot, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì il 10 gennaio 1545, nel Prescot, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eme Hillsonは1512年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアファルンウオルスで生まれた。約1532年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレスコトでLord Humphrey Gorsuchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1545年1月10日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレスコトで33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eme Hillson(은)는 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 패른워스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스컷에서 Lord Humphrey Gorsuch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 1월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스컷에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Eme Hillson nasceu em 1512, em Farnworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Lord Humphrey Gorsuch aproximadamente 1532, em Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1545, em Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Eme Hillson родилась в 1512 г. в местности фарнворт, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Humphrey Gorsuch около 1532 г. в местности прескот, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла 10 января 1545 г. в местности прескот, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Eme Hillson nació en 1512, en Farnworth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Lord Humphrey Gorsuch aproximadamente 1532, en Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 10 de enero de 1545, en Prescot, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 33 años.
